findings: Destination Port shows moderate shortcut-like predictive leverage but also exhibits high local label neighborhood conflicts and duplicate label conflicts.
Strong class-conditioned distributional divergence is confounded by low cardinality and structural irregularities, indicating potential artifact signals mixed with genuine attack signals.
Local evidence does not conclusively distinguish artifact signals from genuine attack targeting signals in the destination port distribution.
limitations: analysis limited to local evidence in destination port feature; global aggregation or cross-feature analysis not performed
